invariant_statement: During withdrawal finalization, l2Sender should be the default sender before entry, should become the L2 withdrawal sender only while the target call is executing, should block nested finalization while non-default, and should not persist as non-default after success, target failure, gas-estimation revert, or insufficient-gas revert.

source_observations.finding: The finalization path checks l2Sender before the external target call and reverts with OptimismPortal_NoReentrancy when it is not the default sender.
source_observations.interpretation: This is the primary reentrancy guard for nested finalization.

source_observations.finding: The finalization path sets l2Sender to the L2 withdrawal sender before SafeCall.callWithMinGas and resets l2Sender to the default value immediately after the call returns.
source_observations.interpretation: The intended externally observable window for l2Sender is the target call only.

source_observations.finding: The function emits WithdrawalFinalized after resetting l2Sender, then may revert only for the special gas-estimation origin when the target call failed.
source_observations.interpretation: A gas-estimation revert should roll state back to the pre-call default l2Sender state.

source_observations.finding: The upstream test suite includes a target-call reentrancy test where the target attempts to finalize another withdrawal and expects OptimismPortal_NoReentrancy.
source_observations.interpretation: Nested finalization protection has direct test coverage.

source_observations.finding: The upstream test suite covers target failure when tx.origin is the gas-estimation address and expects OptimismPortal_GasEstimation.
source_observations.interpretation: The post-reset estimation-revert branch has behavior coverage, but not an explicit l2Sender post-state assertion.

source_observations.finding: The upstream test suite covers failed target calls and ETHLockbox failed-target behavior.
source_observations.interpretation: The failed-call paths have balance/event coverage, but the extracted snippets do not show explicit l2Sender-default postcondition assertions.

state_matrix.current_evidence: Source reset at lines 594-595; success tests emit WithdrawalFinalized true.
state_matrix.gap: Add explicit post-state assertion after success.

state_matrix.path: target call returns false without estimation revert
state_matrix.current_evidence: Source reset before false event; failed-target tests assert balances and no stuck ETH.
state_matrix.gap: Add explicit post-state assertion after false finalization.

state_matrix.path: target call returns false with gas-estimation origin
state_matrix.expected_exit: whole transaction reverts; persisted l2Sender remains default
state_matrix.current_evidence: Source resets before estimation revert; upstream test expects OptimismPortal_GasEstimation.
state_matrix.gap: Add explicit assertion in a wrapper or after expectRevert that l2Sender remains default.

state_matrix.expected_exit: whole transaction reverts; persisted l2Sender remains default
state_matrix.current_evidence: Upstream insufficient-gas test expects SafeCall revert.
state_matrix.gap: Add explicit l2Sender default assertion after revert.

state_matrix.entry_requirement: outer call has set l2Sender to withdrawal sender
state_matrix.during_target_call: nested call observes non-default l2Sender and reverts
state_matrix.expected_exit: outer call may finalize; nested withdrawal not finalized
state_matrix.current_evidence: Upstream reentrancy test expects OptimismPortal_NoReentrancy and checks bob balance unchanged.
state_matrix.gap: Add explicit l2Sender default assertion after outer call.

state_matrix.current_evidence: External proof path calls same finalization body and upstream tests cover replay behavior.
state_matrix.gap: Add explicit post-state assertion for external-proof variant.

memo_conclusion.reason: The source and upstream tests show a deliberate l2Sender reentrancy guard and reset pattern. The useful local next step is a hardening/regression fixture that adds explicit l2Sender post-state assertions across success, false-return, estimation-revert, insufficient-gas, nested-call, and external-proof paths.

runnable_local_fixture_plan.why_not_executed: This agent is staying within report-only source review; fork/local test execution remains a later explicit proof step.
candidate_test_additions: assertEq(optimismPortal2.l2Sender(), Constants.DEFAULT_L2_SENDER) after failed target finalization that emits WithdrawalFinalized false
assertEq(optimismPortal2.l2Sender(), Constants.DEFAULT_L2_SENDER) after reentrancy test outer finalization
runnable_local_fixture_plan.promotion_gate: Only promote beyond hardening memo if a local fixture demonstrates non-default l2Sender persistence or incorrect observation with direct in-scope impact.

known_issue_overlap: Does not repackage the known portal implementation stranded-funds issue.
Does not claim generic reentrancy; upstream test coverage already exercises nested finalize reversion.

next_action: Create a local fixture design packet or patch plan for the l2Sender postcondition assertions; do not submit, test live targets, run fork tests, or claim a vulnerability unless a concrete failing local proof exists.
